title: 100 Pack White Plastic Reusable Spoons, Heavy Duty Washable Cutlery, Commercial Tableware, Tablespoons for Dining
features: QUANTITY: Set of 100 white plastic spoons perfect for commercial dining establishments and home use
DURABILITY: Heavy-duty construction ensures these spoons maintain their shape and rigidity through multiple uses
REUSABLE DESIGN: Sturdy plastic material allows for repeated washing and reuse, making them a cost-effective choice
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for restaurants, cafeterias, parties, and daily home dining needs
EASY MAINTENANCE: Dishwasher safe and simple to clean, these spoons are designed for convenient care and storage
description: Elevate your dining experience with this set of 100 white reusable plastic spoons, designed for both home and commercial use. These heavy-duty tablespoons are crafted to withstand repeated use, making them a practical choice for restaurants, cafes, or busy households. The durable construction ensures they maintain their shape and functionality through multiple uses, whilst being completely washable for continued service. Each spoon in this comprehensive set offers the perfect size for comfortable dining, suitable for main courses, desserts, or serving needs. The classic white colour maintains a professional appearance and seamlessly integrates with existing tableware collections. These versatile spoons are an excellent investment for any establishment seeking reliable, long-lasting cutlery solutions that combine practicality with durability. The substantial pack size ensures you'll always have clean spoons ready for service, whether you're hosting a large gathering or managing daily food service operations.
